testedConfigurations: Debian Linux v11 running on a Dell VEP4600 with an Intel Xeon D-2145NT with PAA Debian Linux v11 running on a Dell VEP4600 with an Intel Xeon D-2145NT without PAA
certificate.description: The CE Crypto Module is a firmware cryptographic module running on a multi-chip standalone general-purpose compute platform. The module provides low-level cryptographic primitives to the overall platform and its functions.
